Live: Match Day Review E39 -United v Nottingham Forest[Live]
U18s Highlights 25/26 E30 -Manchester City v United
E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E418 - Pups Save A City Kitty / Pups Save A Cloud Surfer
programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods. // Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.title: E619 - Pups Save A White Wolf / Pups Save A Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. // Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: E106 - The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E407 - Spring
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E405 - The Super-Size Prize
programme.desc: At the Axle City Fair, Blaze and AJ realize they don't have enough coins to use the new Supersize Prize Machine. So to earn money, Blaze gets three different jobs, transforming into super-cool vehicles to take care of business.

programme.title: E109 - Pups Save The Treats / Pups Get A Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day! // Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: E106 - The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E222 - Sports Day
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the “tug of war”. Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: E223 - Granddad Dog's Garage
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: E107 - Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: E516 - Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E107 - Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: E320 - Pups Get Skunked / Pups And A Whale Of A Tale
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups delicately try to tell her she needs a bath! // The pups put a new spin on freeze tag after they fly far north to help free a baby whale that's trapped under the ice.

programme.title: E811 - Pups Vs. A Neon Humdinger
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, the Paw Patrol must stop it from rolling through town.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: E110 - Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto 'finders, keepers' a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: Romancing Star 2
programme.desc: As a low-ranking director in Channel 9, Liu Pat turns the station's programmes tremendously vivid. So the boss of Channel 8 orders to get back the audience by hooks or by crooks...

programme.title: Wheels On Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David are two quick-witted vendors hawking Chinese fast food from their truck in the busy squares of Barcelona. Their acquaintance with beautiful pickpocket, Sylvia, brings them in contact with novice detective Moby, who is trying to track her whereabouts. Sylvia is actually a wealthy heiress kidnapped by the evil count, who is trying to siphon off her inheritance. The trio puts a spanner in the count's plans, and rescue Sylvia...

programme.title: Teaching Sucks
programme.desc: Lam's childhood desire was to become a teacher. After graduating from university, he actually fulfilled his dream and found himself “STAND & DELIVER”, becoming a teacher. When Lam started teaching, he was full of hope and enthusiasm. After three years of experience in the industry, he gradually become stale about his job like the other teachers...

programme.title: Dragons Forever
programme.desc: Hotshot lawyer is hired by a mysterious chemistry factory to dig up dirt on an inconvenient fishery seeking damaging court action. Sidekick Hung and professional crook Yuen swiftly sprint to Chan's aid. Ironically the gang finds their toughness softening in the face of two gorgeous ladies at the fishery. They inadvertently hit a center nerve of the chemical factory when they unmask the hideous facade of a narcotic syndicate.

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: Parking Service
programme.desc: Stanley was an optimistic youth, feeling bored in his pig-rearing job, he decided to part with his beloved uncle and aunt and seek for an ideal job to achieve his own goal in life. He then found a job in Tsim Sha Tsui East. There he worked as a member of a parking service team and befriended one of his colleagues Ah Man. Ah Man was a reticent guy who was always frustrated by reality. The problem that he could not afford his sister to further studies in oversea puzzled him now and then. His anxiety was intensified by his sorrowful devotion to a mysterious beautiful girl Stella. Stanley was enthusiastic to help Ah Man to be acquainted with Stella. This made Ah Man live in high spirits. Stanley also encouraged his colleagues to work with enthusiasm. Their team was therefore rewarded with more tips by customers. A member of another team was a man of misconduct who stole spare parts and valuables from customer's cars. Mr. Yang, was a man who made fake banknotes...

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: Wisdom thief Ren Jiahua girlfriend Ann as an internal, using high-tech techniques robbed by the escort vehicle, have stolen money of one hundred and seventy thousand million. Crime Unit Chief Inspector Li Tiejian with detectives working around the clock to detect, eventually discover clues. Suspect that China and Ann is the mastermind of the case, but there is no evidence against. Lee tried various methods interrogations to no avail, Finally solely strict confession, but two willpower Jianli, tolerate the torture and recrimination Li officers tortured. Until the final drama, all the officers with ingenious ways, the two incriminating expose to justice.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: E5 - Wild Wedding Party
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: E6 - Sting Operation
programme.desc: Billy and Beekeeper Ian extract a bee colony from a family home, then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to remove a Great Horned Owl from a house.

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile E486
programme.desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E185
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas E122
programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Ask us Anything!
programme.desc: Dr. Xand turns fire juggler to reveal the body's secret sense – proprioception, but will Dr. Chris notice something is up? And Dr. Dan investigates organs on chips, with no salt and vinegar!

programme.title: Mega-Triplet 3000
programme.desc: As a gift, the Triplets receive a machine run by a controller that only the Triplets can use. This can only end in chaos. Is DiktaThor behind all this? Now Sprinter has to get the Triplets to work together in battling DiktaThor and his evil plan.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: New Names
programme.desc: Can the Junior Vets determine the sex of a very special penguin? Six cute kittens need checkups and new names - meet X-ray, Smudge, and, of course, baby Johnny! And Paul, the rat, has trouble breathing.

programme.title: Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: Horn of Africa
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their journey through Mountain Zebra National Park in South Africa. Game rangers teach them about Black Rhinos and White Rhinos and the importance of protecting them.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: Types of Circuits
programme.desc: Making one lamp work is simple but getting a whole bunch of them to light up means Smorph needs to learn how different circuits work.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Fire Team Doki
programme.desc: After a false fire alarm at the clubhouse, the team is very impressed with the firefighters who answer the call. What does it take to be a firefighter? Firefighter Domenic offers to train the team at the fire hall, so they can see for themselves!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Conductivity
programme.desc: An accident rescuing a piece of toast from the toaster leads Smorph to find out how some materials conduct electricity and some do not.

programme.title: Sea Traffic Accident
programme.desc: The Spanish Coast Guard is calling for the MeteoHeroes' help to prevent potentially harmful cargo from falling into the sea! Pluvia and Nix are on their way to save the day.

programme.title: What's That Smell
programme.desc: Residents of a farming community in the USA have complained about a mysterious, terrible odor! It's up to the MeteoHeroes to find and eliminate the source of the stink. But that's not all. Penguin Peeguu detects a distress call from a group of chickens.

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: What Makes Fireworks Bang?
programme.desc: Fireworks were invented in China and were originally thought to be able to get rid of evil spirits and bring good luck. One of the most important components in fireworks is gunpowder. The different metal salts produce the colours.

programme.title: Goukamma - A Last Wild
programme.desc: While exploring the picturesque Garden Route, the Zebrabus stumbles onto a hidden retreat with some of the highest vegetated dunes in South Africa. They face snakes and other reptiles before venturing out to sea in search of sharks.

programme.title: The Leech's Spaghetti Dinner
programme.desc: The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It finds earthworms to eat by following the smell of their slimy trail. Because the leech has no teeth, it slurps the worms like spaghetti.

programme.title: Embiggenator
programme.desc: Motor creates a machine that can increase the size of objects, and soon everyone wants something made bigger, from paint cans to televisions to little Albert...

programme.title: Birthday Probability
programme.desc: What if somebody dared you to prove that at least two people in your class had the same birthday? Would you take the challenge? If you accepted, and your class had at least 23 people, chances are you would win.

programme.title: Programming Language
programme.desc: How does a computer understand what we want it to do? We use a language that it can understand. Find out about all the different types of languages that are used in programming.

programme.title: What Makes Fireworks Bang?
programme.desc: Fireworks were invented in China and were originally thought to be able to get rid of evil spirits and bring good luck. One of the most important components in fireworks is gunpowder. The different metal salts produce the colours.

programme.title: More Science Magic
programme.desc: Steve Spangler shows the secret to lying on a bed of nails and how to magically restore broken glass. These amazing tricks are all based on science.

programme.title: Fat-Busting Bile
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand investigate how your body digests fat and show you how to make bile art!

programme.title: Super Sensitive Skin
programme.desc: Your body's largest organ is your skin – find out how it works and how to make your own homunculus!

programme.title: Making It Happen
programme.desc: It's time for coach Luke to give his Birmingham boys the news they've been waiting for. Who's made it onto the National Squad and is going to Lillishall for intensive training with the national coaches? Back in Bristol, Chase has an exciting training day ahead of him.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Conductivity
programme.desc: An accident rescuing a piece of toast from the toaster leads Smorph to find out how some materials conduct electricity and some do not.

programme.title: Types of Circuits
programme.desc: Making one lamp work is simple but getting a whole bunch of them to light up means Smorph needs to learn how different circuits work.

programme.title: Conductivity
programme.desc: An accident rescuing a piece of toast from the toaster leads Smorph to find out how some materials conduct electricity and some do not.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Goukamma - A Last Wild
programme.desc: While exploring the picturesque Garden Route, the Zebrabus stumbles onto a hidden retreat with some of the highest vegetated dunes in South Africa. They face snakes and other reptiles before venturing out to sea in search of sharks.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: E8 - Outbreak!
programme.desc: The race is on to find Tulia and Zalipa, who are missing from Palas Island. And after months of convalescence, Beni returns to forest school but faces another setback at the milk bucket. Meanwhile, the vets keep a close eye on pregnant Dilla.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E5 - Battle for the Bay
programme.desc: Follow the Bay Family’s matriarch as she chases the Nomads out of her territory for good, and examine the surprising birthing den where the Townies’ leader, Mia, settles in. Then kick back with the Mangrove Family as they pal around with stray dogs.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E5 - Battle for the Bay
programme.desc: Follow the Bay Family’s matriarch as she chases the Nomads out of her territory for good, and examine the surprising birthing den where the Townies’ leader, Mia, settles in. Then kick back with the Mangrove Family as they pal around with stray dogs.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E2 - Agile
programme.desc: Check out some fancy footwork and killer alpha moves. Catch a male brown hare throwing punches at his beloved, admire a sandhill crane dance battle, watch ibexes butt heads (literally) during mating season, and see why leopards are stealth masters.

programme.title: E2 - Young Devils
programme.desc: Tasmanian Devils might have the most infamous reputations of any of the country’s marsupials, but these spirited scrappers also have another side. They’re committed parents and heroic defenders of their pouch-reared young.

programme.title: E1 - Reef Wrecks of Bonaire
programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: E4 - The Feathering Nest
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species, and in this episode we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life. Wherever they live, these birds have got their work cut out, holding their territory against invaders, attracting and winning partners and safeguarding their chicks.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E1 - Queen of Yala
programme.desc: The shadowy forests of Yala National Park are the perfect hideout for secretive leopards. It’s time for one young female, Asha, to strike out alone. Join her as she fights for her own territory, finds a mate, and becomes a mother.

programme.title: E3 - Lake Hunters
programme.desc: Sri Lanka’s lowlands are dotted with thousands of seemingly peaceful lakes, but don’t be fooled, this is the realm of the mugger crocodile. Muggers are hunters from day one. Watch as these supreme predators compete with each other in the fierce heat.

programme.title: E5 - From Cloud to Coast
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island’s forests.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E8 - Outbreak!
programme.desc: The race is on to find Tulia and Zalipa, who are missing from Palas Island. And after months of convalescence, Beni returns to forest school but faces another setback at the milk bucket. Meanwhile, the vets keep a close eye on pregnant Dilla.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E5 - Battle for the Bay
programme.desc: Follow the Bay Family’s matriarch as she chases the Nomads out of her territory for good, and examine the surprising birthing den where the Townies’ leader, Mia, settles in. Then kick back with the Mangrove Family as they pal around with stray dogs.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E5 - Battle for the Bay
programme.desc: Follow the Bay Family’s matriarch as she chases the Nomads out of her territory for good, and examine the surprising birthing den where the Townies’ leader, Mia, settles in. Then kick back with the Mangrove Family as they pal around with stray dogs.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E2 - Agile
programme.desc: Check out some fancy footwork and killer alpha moves. Catch a male brown hare throwing punches at his beloved, admire a sandhill crane dance battle, watch ibexes butt heads (literally) during mating season, and see why leopards are stealth masters.

programme.title: E2 - Young Devils
programme.desc: Tasmanian Devils might have the most infamous reputations of any of the country’s marsupials, but these spirited scrappers also have another side. They’re committed parents and heroic defenders of their pouch-reared young.

programme.title: E1 - Reef Wrecks of Bonaire
programme.desc: Bonaire’s fringing reef is home to thousands of species of corals, fish and other marine animals. It is also home to a collection of stunning shipwrecks. These wrecks evolve over time, becoming artificial reefs that support an incredibly diverse marine habitat.

programme.title: E4 - The Feathering Nest
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species, and in this episode we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life. Wherever they live, these birds have got their work cut out, holding their territory against invaders, attracting and winning partners and safeguarding their chicks.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E1 - Queen of Yala
programme.desc: The shadowy forests of Yala National Park are the perfect hideout for secretive leopards. It’s time for one young female, Asha, to strike out alone. Join her as she fights for her own territory, finds a mate, and becomes a mother.

programme.title: E3 - Lake Hunters
programme.desc: Sri Lanka’s lowlands are dotted with thousands of seemingly peaceful lakes, but don’t be fooled, this is the realm of the mugger crocodile. Muggers are hunters from day one. Watch as these supreme predators compete with each other in the fierce heat.

programme.title: E5 - From Cloud to Coast
programme.desc: Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the island’s forests.

programme.title: America's Wild Border: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Trail Atlantic puffins, Prairie rattlesnakes, Alaskan caribou and other animals as they travel across the international boundary between the U.S. and Canada. See how they can move from safety to target by crossing a line they had no say in creating.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E28 - Grannies
programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.title: E29 - The Creek
programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy

programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas Meets Gustavo, another big blue engine who reminds him of Gordon back home.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E33 - The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E11 - Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: E30 - Turtle Boy
programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

E3
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E20 - JJ's Bedtime & Daily Routines!
programme.desc: Join JJ for bedtime stories & daily routines! Mommy sings a lullaby when JJ doesn't want to sleep, & Ms. Appleberry leads the first nap time at school. Then, walk Bingo around the neighborhood as everyone greets JJ! The routine fun continues as the family builds JJ's first big boy bed together & has a fun mother-daughter day. Plus, Mommy & Daddy sneak into the kitchen for a late-night snack!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on some big family adventures! First, the family goes on vacation & experiences the excitement of taking a plane for the first time, while also learning some good manners. Then, they are off to the aquarium to see all kinds of sea creatures, like seahorses, jellyfish & an octopus! The adventures continue with a trip to the jungle park to see birds & monkeys, & a super fun day at the fair!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E156
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.title: E386
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.
Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.desc: A talk-variety show hosted by no less than celebrity mom Carmina Villarroel together with her talented twins Mavy and Cassy. Learn new recipes from Carmina and her twins while she shares parenting tips with their Kapuso celebrity guests.

programme.title: Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: A travel and wildlife documentary series that brings viewers up close with nature, wildlife, and environmental conservation issues across the Philippines and beyond.

programme.title: Daig Kayo Ng Lola Ko
programme.desc: A fantasy-anthology series where Lola Goreng and her grandchildren share magical stories that teach values and life lessons to children and families.

programme.title: I Bilib
programme.desc: The show features scientific experiments and explores different scientific facts and theories surrounding everyday events presented in magical manner. The show also features some cosplay pictures by different cosplayers.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: E5 - Jim (Part A)
programme.desc: Jim has been a collector from a very young age but some of the tragedies in his life have compounded Jim's hoarding behavior.

programme.title: E2 - Kamryn Johnson
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: E159
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant claims she's the wife of a prince; a church pastor gets sentenced for running an unlicensed funeral business; and more.

programme.title: E160
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: Murder And Mayhem In Taipei
programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.title: E121 - In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: E9 - Episode 9: Autumn
programme.desc: Jamie rounds up his autumnal offerings with some gorgeous squash in a cheesy sauce, a zingy celeriac dressing for his remoulade and a foraged blackberry, apple and pear cobbler.

programme.title: E2 - Hidden Retreats
programme.desc: Explore a beauty high in the cliffs of Norway. An unusual shipment of containers stacked in the outback of New South Wales. And a network of striking treehouses concealed in an English forest.

programme.title: E3 - Starting From Scratch
programme.desc: Mary meets Anton Du Beke in sunny Bournemouth to teach him simple recipes, perfect for a total beginner, squeezing in time for a waltz along the pier and trip on the Ferris wheel.

programme.title: E9 - Dubai Innovations
programme.desc: Jason cooks up some classic British and French dishes from his first time in Dubai over 20 years ago. He'll be celebrating his dear friend Gary Rhodes who was THE Dubai innovator. He'll cook up some classic Rhodes dishes, including smoked haddock Welsh rarebit and bread and butter pudding.

programme.desc: Amanda and Alan brace themselves to tackle the heart of the B&B - the kitchen. Big plans are afoot with a Spanish-tiled extravaganza, but neither of them can agree on a colour scheme.

The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.desc: Ruby’s latest wish looks like it may be granting itself!

programme.title: E2 - Speaking Truth
programme.desc: Will alienates himself from the Bel-Air basketball team and finds appealing opportunities in love and basketball with the help of some new South LA friends.

programme.title: E2 - Ali Baba And The Forty Thieves
programme.desc: Ali Baba is a young Arabian girl who outsmarts the Great One and his forty thieves.

programme.title: E38 - Banned From The Stand
programme.desc: Gazpacho tries to convince Mung to prove that he is right, but Mung refuses, so he restricts everybody from his stand until it becomes a problem.

programme.title: E1 - The Arborians
programme.desc: Chowder and the gang must get syrup for a recipe.

programme.title: E14 - The Big Hat Biddies
programme.desc: It's Truffles' big day to impress the members of the Big Hat Biddies.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: E11 - Crossing Lines
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: E12 - The Forbidden Kiss
programme.desc: When a crew member has to leave the boat, a secret kiss happens that sends the entire crew into a spiral. The crew visits an elite sailing team and attends a flamenco show where major epiphanies occur. A surprise visitor comes aboard that could change everything.

programme.title: E13 - The Poo-Petrator
programme.desc: A blast from the past has one of the crew members desperate to reignite an old flame. New crew configurations cause resentments to blossom. A guest leaves an unwelcome surprise in the shower, setting off a mystery within the interior.

programme.title: E14 - Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: E4 - Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: E5 - Let The Games Vegan
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: E6 - The Tempest
programme.desc: Bad weather rolls in suddenly and causes chaos. A crew member takes on a new role and shifts the group dynamic. Romance heats up on board, prompting jealousy and a crew member initiates a tearful breakup.

programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: E7 - Special Traditions
programme.desc: Traditions are shaped over time. They are also perpetuated by techniques magnified by Mauviel, Lison de Caunes and Solene Eloy to perfection. Watches, corsets, hoop earrings: small objects can tell great stories.

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. Originally a medieval fortress built during the Crusades, the Boussay castle became a Renaissance residence and later an agricultural estate.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The brigade is divided into three teams, and the members of each trio face off by cooking the same fish. During the challenge, an extra ingredient appears and changes everything.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.desc: K-pop Idols Meet the World! A one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show where idols experience global cultures and connect with fans worldwide.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 1. The King's Residence, Changdeokgung 2. The Secret Garden of Changdeokgung 3. The Secret of the Volcanic Island 4. Forest of the Stone Buddha 5. Harmony of the Heaven and Earth, Hawking 6. The Underwater Palace, Daryeodo 7. Scholar's Waterway, Hahoe Folk Village 8. A Worship for the King, Gwangneung Forest

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E220 - Judge Lay Lay
programme.desc: The Alexander family looks to Lay Lay to cast the deciding vote on family decisions, but the newfound power goes to her head, and one ruling causes a rift between her and Sadie.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E210 - Dylan and Rebecca's Cleve-Land-Land Adventure
programme.desc: The Alexanders get another visit from Young Dylan, whose cousin Rebecca joins Sadie at the launch event for the new version of their favorite video game, while Dylan enlists Lay Lay to help get his music on the game soundtrack.

programme.title: E316 - Swellview’s Got Talent
programme.desc: After discovering contestants on Swellview's Got Talent are losing consciousness, Captain Man and Kid Danger enlist the help of Charlotte and Schwoz in order to find out what is causing the mischief.

programme.title: E103 - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: E310 - Biscuit Ballyhoo / Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs joins the ring and turns it into a competition. // When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: Overheard 2
programme.desc: LAW Man-seng is one of the most reputable securities dealers in Hong Kong. One day, he drives his luxury sports car and notices that a car is tailing him. His car finally crashes and Law is sent to the hospital. At the hospital, he sees a police officer HO Chi-keung, and thinks the officer is here for the car accident. But Ho works for the Department of Homeland Security which is responsible for counter-terrorism. Ho has found some surveillance devices in the wreckage of Law's sports car which are for military use...

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Ming & Cheng have a son named Won. One day, Won suddenly had a persistent high fever. As a result, Won died due to lack of rescue. She was very sad and thought that Won was still alive. Then, they meet a person name Xia, who could help people heal the pain of losing their loved ones, Xia gave Cheng a doll, which seemed to be just an ordinary doll, but when it reached her hands, the doll turned into Won. But in Ming eyes, he was just a doll. Xia reminds Ming that this doll must not be damaged. Since then, they have lived happily ever after. But Ming began to feel that Cheng was too obsessed with this illusion and felt that the doll was getting spooky and became an unknown object. He could not stand it and secretly destroyed the doll, but what he didn't expect that Cheng still regarded the broken doll as Won. She thought that he killed her son. Ming started arguing with her, hoping to wake her up, but accidentally injured Cheng, then unexpectedly something happened to Ming...

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E2 - 制服帥哥天團 上演顏值暴擊
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。
